TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_George_Brown, title = George_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/George_Brown} }

S.FORM: George Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1935, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 10, George Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

George Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1935, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 10, George Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ɣeorɣe βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ɣeorɣe βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
